query:
SELECT cp.id, cp.projectId, p.name as projectName, cp.status, 
       COUNT(cpc.id) as consultantCount
FROM cpa_projects cp
LEFT JOIN projects p ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cpa_project_consultants cpc ON cp.id = cpc.cpaProjectId
GROUP BY cp.id
ORDER BY cp.id DESC
LIMIT 1
